researcher_context.primary_field: Computational biomedical research — lung cancer survival analysis and machine learning for adjuvant chemotherapy recommendations
methodological_interests: Survival analysis and time-to-event modeling (Cox PH, deep survival, accelerated failure time)
Machine learning for treatment effect estimation and individualized treatment recommendation
Causal inference in observational oncology data
LLMs for meta-analysis screening and automated evidence synthesis
adjacent_fields_of_interest: Mathematical oncology and mechanistic tumor models (ODE, PDE, agent-based)
Tumor microenvironment biology — stromal, vascular, and immune compartments
Immuno-oncology, with specific interest in CAR T-cell therapy
Tumor immunology — T-cell exhaustion, antigen escape, neoantigen prediction
Scientific machine learning — physics-informed neural networks, neural ODEs, hybrid mechanistic-ML models
researcher_context.bridge_description: Bridge statistical and ML approaches used in clinical oncology with mechanistic biological models from tumor immunology and CAR T-cell dynamics. Prioritise connections where mechanistic structure could inform a survival model, or where treatment-effect heterogeneity could be explained by an underlying mechanistic process.
avoid_topics: general LLM benchmarking unrelated to biomedical use
non-cancer dynamical systems with no obvious biomedical relevance
purely engineering applications of physics-informed ML

search_queries: lung cancer survival prediction machine learning prognosis
non-small cell lung cancer NSCLC adjuvant chemotherapy treatment effect
individualized treatment recommendation causal inference oncology
large language models systematic review screening evidence synthesis
tumor microenvironment mathematical model immune cell dynamics
CAR T cell therapy mechanistic model dynamics solid tumor
tumor immune interaction agent based model spatial
T cell exhaustion antigen escape immunotherapy resistance
physics informed neural networks pharmacology drug response
scientific machine learning differential equations systems biology
hybrid mechanistic machine learning treatment response prediction
neural ODE survival analysis time to event
